title: Supply Chain Manager - Rivigo - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rivigo - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
